detaileddescription.para: Confine the useCase to the Height and Width restrictions of the HW. Height and Width data in proposed useCase are altered if necessary.
1) Program the TPG and the VPSS input stage to the input video format. 2) Program the VPSS output stage to the output video format.

simplesect.para: Returns XST_SUCCESS, if stream configured properly, otherwise XST_FAILURE.

detaileddescription.para: Configure and Start the video system.

simplesect.para: Returns XST_SUCCESS for successful configuration, else XST_FAILURE.

briefdescription.para: Resets the video IP cores by toggling the GPIO pins.

detaileddescription.para: This function performs a reset sequence on the video IPs by writing specific values to the GPIO base address. The sequence involves setting the GPIO pins high, waiting for a short delay, setting them low, waiting again, and then setting them high once more. After the reset sequence, a message is printed to indicate completion.
Note: The delay is implemented using a simple for-loop and may not be precise.
